query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS videos (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  videoUrl VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  subtitleUrl VARCHAR(500),
  moduleId INT,
  duration INT,
  language VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'en',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (moduleId) REFERENCES independent_study_modules(id)
);

INSERT INTO videos (title, description, videoUrl, subtitleUrl, moduleId, duration, language) VALUES
('FMC Origins: Our Heritage', 'Learn about the origins of the Free Methodist Church and John Wesley''s Methodist Movement', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663416906571/kBmgeZHWTyHuceHoeAKRrp/fmc-video-1-origins_478d0d8a.mp4', '/fmc-video-1-origins.srt', NULL, 480, 'en'),
('FMC Core Beliefs', 'Understand the core beliefs of the Free Methodist Church including Scripture, Salvation, and Holiness', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663416906571/kBmgeZHWTyHuceHoeAKRrp/fmc-video-2-beliefs_c85c8d7c.mp4', '/fmc-video-2-beliefs.srt', NULL, 480, 'en'),
('Holy Living: Practical Examples', 'Discover what it means to live a holy life with practical examples and applications', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663416906571/kBmgeZHWTyHuceHoeAKRrp/fmc-video-3-holiness_f7108b91.mp4', '/fmc-video-3-holiness.srt', NULL, 480, 'en'),
('FMC Church Organization', 'Learn how the Free Methodist Church is organized and how decisions are made', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663416906571/kBmgeZHWTyHuceHoeAKRrp/fmc-video-4-organization_8dbd6bc9.mp4', '/fmc-video-4-organization.srt', NULL, 480, 'en'),
('FMC Leadership Roles', 'Understand different leadership roles: Pastor, Deacon, and Lay Leader', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663416906571/kBmgeZHWTyHuceHoeAKRrp/fmc-video-5-leadership_40b0de8e.mp4', '/fmc-video-5-leadership.srt', NULL, 480, 'en'),
('FMC Social Justice', 'Learn about FMC commitment to caring for the poor and marginalized', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663416906571/kBmgeZHWTyHuceHoeAKRrp/fmc-video-6-justice_5659fca5.mp4', '/fmc-video-6-justice.srt', NULL, 480, 'en');

  moduleId INT,

);
